ideation: This sequence depicts a robot gently lowering its hands to indicate a decrease in volume.  The movement is slow and deliberate, emphasizing the quiet nature of the emoji. The robot's arms will start in a neutral position, then move downward in a controlled manner, with the palms facing inward. The final frame shows the arms at a lower position, suggesting the reduction in volume.  The subtle movement aims to convey a sense of careful quietening rather than a sudden stop.

frames.beat: arms start neutral, ready to quiet
both arms lower slowly, palms inward
